title: Broken Bone Emergency 骨折看急诊
scene: Jack摔伤了手臂，被送到急诊室。

lines.en: Doctor, I fell off my bike and my arm hurts!
lines.zh: 医生，我从自行车上摔下来，手臂好疼！

lines.en: Let me see. Can you move your fingers?
lines.zh: 让我看看。你能动手指吗？

lines.en: Yes, but my arm really hurts when I try.
lines.zh: 能，但尝试动的时候手臂很疼。

lines.en: We need to take an X-ray first.
It is just a small crack, not a full break.
lines.zh: 只是轻微骨裂，没有完全骨折。

lines.en: Yes. You will wear it for about four weeks.
lines.zh: 需要。你需要戴大约四周。

lines.en: Can I still go to school?
Yes, but do not run or play sports for a while.
lines.zh: 可以，但暂时不要跑步或做运动。
